summary_en: A starter reference page for understanding how Jain minority status may affect access to schemes and institutional processes.
summary_hi: A starter reference page for understanding how Jain minority status may affect access to schemes and institutional processes.
eligibility_en: Review the official policy or department website for the latest definition, scope, and application rules.
benefit_en: Helps families and institutions identify the correct official authority before applying or escalating a case.
documents_required_en: Identity proof, domicile or institutional records, and any forms required by the official authority.

summary_en: A placeholder resource for tracking scholarships offered through government, institutional, or trust-based channels.
summary_hi: A placeholder resource for tracking scholarships offered through government, institutional, or trust-based channels.
eligibility_en: Eligibility varies by scholarship. Always verify academic, income, and category requirements at the official source.
benefit_en: Can support tuition, fees, or educational expenses depending on the official scheme terms.
documents_required_en: Mark sheets, income certificate, identity proof, bank details, and institution documents may be required.

summary_en: Starter resource for listing Jain schools, colleges, pathshalas, libraries, and study centers.
summary_hi: Starter resource for listing Jain schools, colleges, pathshalas, libraries, and study centers.
eligibility_en: Open to students, families, and researchers looking for Jain educational institutions.
benefit_en: Helps users discover institutions and reach official sources directly.
documents_required_en: Not applicable for directory browsing. Individual institutions may require their own admission documents.

title_en: Jain trusts and NGO support links
title_hi: Jain trusts and NGO support links
summary_en: Placeholder listing structure for Jain trusts, charities, and NGOs working in education, health, seva, and relief.
summary_hi: Placeholder listing structure for Jain trusts, charities, and NGOs working in education, health, seva, and relief.
eligibility_en: Varies by trust and programme. Please verify directly with the organization.
benefit_en: Can help families, volunteers, and institutions discover verified support channels.
documents_required_en: Depends on the trust or NGO and the support being requested.
